inputs.label: Register Tons
inputs.businessContext: Volume in register tons (1 RT = 100 cubic feet)

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume in register tons (1 RT = 100 cubic feet)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kayıt tonu cinsinden hacim (1 RT = 100 fit küp)

inputs.label: Cubic Meters
inputs.businessContext: Volume in cubic meters (for reverse conversion)

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume in cubic meters (for reverse conversion)

inputs.label: Conversion Direction
inputs.businessContext: Select direction: 0 for register tons to cubic meters, 1 for cubic meters to register tons

businessContext_i18n.en: Select direction: 0 for register tons to cubic meters, 1 for cubic meters to register tons
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yön seçin: 0 kayıt tondan metreküpe, 1 metreküpten kayıt tona

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding result

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding result
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucu yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı

inputs.label: Use Standard Factor
inputs.businessContext: Use standard conversion factor (2.8316846592 m³/RT) if 1, else custom

businessContext_i18n.en: Use standard conversion factor (2.8316846592 m³/RT) if 1, else custom
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm faktörü (2,8316846592 m³/RT) kullanılıyorsa 1, aksi halde özel

inputs.label: Custom Factor
inputs.businessContext: Custom conversion factor when not using standard. Default is standard factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Custom conversion factor when not using standard. Default is standard factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart kullanılmadığında özel dönüşüm faktörü. Varsayılan standart faktördür.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
